query: SELECT vr.organizationId, vr.testKey, vr.status, vr.actual, vr.updatedAt, vr.updatedBy, o.slug FROM validationResults vr JOIN organizations o ON o.id = vr.organizationId WHERE o.slug = 'jcrhc' AND vr.testKey IN ('3:2', '3:3') ORDER BY vr.testKey;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 27oV2HNhPbfG1Yy.f6bc15b848e8 --database hgGEXRHUCG7apwzJRKH7LF --execute SELECT vr.organizationId, vr.testKey, vr.status, vr.actual, vr.updatedAt, vr.updatedBy, o.slug FROM validationResults vr JOIN organizations o ON o.id = vr.organizationId WHERE o.slug = 'jcrhc' AND vr.testKey IN ('3:2', '3:3') ORDER BY vr.testKey;
